goal: Add a side-effect-free permit-prep builder for BPK-079 approved cockpit patch decisions, producing permit request metadata for a later task while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, renderer changes, runtime, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call AICOS, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Approved cockpit decisions can be converted to permit-prep metadata without issuing a permit.
Ready BPK-079 decision gate and permit prep refs are required.
assumptions: Actual permit issuance and patch application require later task locks.
dod: Approved, missing permit prep ref, and rejected or blocked decision cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, server mutation, route mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-079 converted cockpit dry-run evidence into explicit operator decisions without applying patches.
